details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all requirements. The INIObject.zig file is properly created with public create, parse, and stringify functions following Zig conventions (jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, @import("bun")). The parser correctly handles sections, key=value pairs, comments (both ; and #), quoted values, type coercion, dotted section names, and inline comments. Proper wiring in BunObject.zig with lazy property callbacks, C++ macro entry, and hash table entry in BunObject.cpp. TypeScript definitions are complete with JSDoc examples. Comprehensive test suite covering edge cases and roundtrips. The parser is self-contained without external npm dependencies. Minor note: imports are placed at end of file rather than top (unconventional but valid in Zig).
